title: garayanthus carinatus
intro: Garayanthus carinatus is a plant species, commonly known as the 'Carina Garay orchid', that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to lower blood pressure and act as an anti-inflammatory agent. The health benefits of Garayanthus carinatus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and provide antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used in teas, tinctures, or infusions to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
